subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! The gaze of divine favor is directed towards the handmaidens of the All-Merciful, and the shadow of His mercy is cast over the heads of His maidservants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه نظر عنایت متوجه اماء رحمن است و سایه رحمت افکنده بر فرق کنیزان
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
